title: Roasty Yam Pancakes with Sweet Fondue
description: A unique keto dessert featuring roasted yam pancakes served with a sweet fondue dip.
instructions: 2. Pierce the yams with a fork and boil them in a large pot of water for 45 minutes.
3. Remove the yams from the water and roast them in the oven for 30 minutes, or until tender.
4. Mix the nut meal, coconut sugar, and keto-friendly pancake mix in a bowl.
5. Add the roasted yams to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
6. Form the dough into pancakes and cook them in a skillet over medium heat.
7. Mix the sugar-free chocolate and heavy cream in a saucepan over low heat.
8. Stir the chocolate mixture until smooth and creamy.
9. Serve the roasted yam pancakes with the sweet fondue dip.
